QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: enabled
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Enable 3D terrain and building visualization alongside the 2D map.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Enable the 3D viewer

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: mapProvider
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Data source for 3D map terrain and building information.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: 3D map data provider

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: osmFilePath
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Path to an offline OpenStreetMap file for 3D terrain rendering.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Path to the OSM file for the 3D viewer.

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: buildingLevelHeight
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Average floor-to-floor height in meters used for 3D building visualization.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Average Height for each level of the buildings

QGC.MetaData.Facts.name: altitudeBias
QGC.MetaData.Facts.shortDesc: Vertical offset in meters for vehicle rendering in the 3D viewer.
QGC.MetaData.Facts.label: Altitude bias for vehicles in the 3D View
